title: 有冇高手識呢幾題passive voice

replies.msg:
The PR manager is to meet our visitor at the airport.
Our visitor_________________.

Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars___________________.

They will have checked at least two hundred application forms by six o'clock.
At least two hundred applications forms_______________.

That morning, his chauffeur was driving him to the palace.
He_____________________ to the palace.

感激

replies.msg:
The PR manager is to meet our visitor at the airport.
Our visitorgo to school by bus

Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars go to school by bus

They will have checked at least two hundred application forms by six o'clock.
At least two hundred applications forms go to school by bus

That morning, his chauffeur was driving him to the palace.
He go to the palace by bus.

replies.msg:
記得有啲verb唔會轉到passive voice例如own
無理由話架車被擁有

The PR manager is to meet our visitor at the airport.
Our visitor is to be met by the PR manager at the airport.

Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars were owned by very few people in those days.

They will have checked at least two hundred application forms by six o'clock.
At least two hundred applications forms will have been checked by six o'clock (by them).

That morning, his chauffeur was driving him to the palace.
He was driven by his chauffeur (that morning) to the palace.

quote.msg: 咩題目嚟?? 除左第3題, 其他轉用 passive voice 都變得好奇怪, 可以話係 bad english
特別係第二題

無理由話架車被擁有

replies.msg: own可以

quote.msg:
The PR manager is to meet our visitor at the airport.
Our visitor is to be met by the PR manager at the airport.

Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars were owned by very few people in those days.

They will have checked at least two hundred application forms by six o'clock.
At least two hundred applications forms will have been checked by six o'clock (by them).

That morning, his chauffeur was driving him to the palace.
He was driven by his chauffeur (that morning) to the palace.

replies.msg:
Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars were used to be owned by very few people.

The PR manager is to meet our visitor at the airport.
Our visitor_ will meet the PR manager at the airport__.

Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars____were owned by very few people___.

They will have checked at least two hundred application forms by six o'clock.
At least two hundred applications forms___will be checked by six o'clock___.

That morning, his chauffeur was driving him to the palace.
He____was driven ____ to the palace.

係網絡上得到答案既唯一方法係先比個錯既答案

quote.msg: 咩題目嚟?? 除左第3題, 其他轉用 passive voice 都變得好奇怪, 可以話係 bad english

replies.msg:
Sensing verbs
唔可以用passive voice

quote.msg:
The PR manager is to meet our visitor at the airport.
Our visitor_ will meet the PR manager at the airport__.

Very few people used to own cars in those days.
In those days, cars____were owned by very few people___.

They will have checked at least two hundred application forms by six o'clock.
At least two hundred applications forms___will be checked by six o'clock___.

That morning, his chauffeur was driving him to the palace.
He____was driven ____ to the palace.

係網絡上得到答案既唯一方法係先比個錯既答案

pinned.msg:
總結返個答案
Our visitor is to be met by the PR manager at the airport.
In those days, cars used to be owned by very few people.
At least two hundred applications forms will have been checked by six o'clock.
He was being driven by his chauffeur that morning to the palace.
